item.title: hashicorp / nomad
item.description:
Desc: Nomad is an easy-to-use, flexible, and performant workload orchestrator that can deploy a mix of microservice, batch, containerized, and non-containerized applications. Nomad is easy to operate and scale and has native Consul and Vault integrations.
Lang: Go
Star: 11283

item.description:
Desc: HCL is the HashiCorp configuration language.
Lang: Go

item.title: vmware-tanzu / tanzu-framework
item.description:
Desc: Tanzu Framework provides a set of building blocks to build atop of the Tanzu platform and leverages Carvel packaging and plugins to provide users with a much stronger, more integrated experience than the loose coupling and stand-alone commands of the previous generation of tools.
Lang: Go
Star: 163

item.title: aws / copilot-cli
item.description:
Desc: The AWS Copilot CLI is a tool for developers to build, release and operate production ready containerized applications on AWS App Runner or Amazon ECS on AWS Fargate.
